Don't pass StreamExecutor parameter to LoadExecutable.  For CPU AOT compilation, we don't need any parameters at all. For GPU, we need Platform::Id and DeviceDescription. This change should make it easier to migrate tests to HloPjrtTestBase, as we should not depend on StreamExecutor in those cases.

hwrng: core - use RCU and work_struct to fix race condition  Currently, hwrng_fill is not cleared until the hwrng_fillfn() thread exits. Since hwrng_unregister() reads hwrng_fill outside the rng_mutex lock, a concurrent hwrng_unregister() may call kthread_stop() again on the same task.  Additionally

crypto: starfive - Fix memory leak in starfive_aes_aead_do_one_req()  The starfive_aes_aead_do_one_req() function allocates rctx->adata with kzalloc() but fails to free it if sg_copy_to_buffer() or starfive_aes_hw_init() fails, which lead to memory leaks.
